thig6.4:1.4: surrounded by a group of slave-women,
thig6.4:2.2: and not a little staple & non-staple food,
thig6.4:2.4: I fetched myself to the pleasure garden.
thig6.4:3.2: we headed back to our home.
thig6.4:3.3:
I saw in Sāketa a hall at the Añjana wood.
I entered.
thig6.4:4.1: Seeing the light of the world,
thig6.4:4.3: He, the One with Eyes, from sympathy, taught me the Dhamma.
thig6.4:5.3: Right there I touched the Dhamma,
thig6.4:6.4: The Buddha’s bidding is not in vain.
